name: King Ranch Chicken Lite
recipeIngredient: 6 large boned and skinned chicken breast halves
10 3/4 ounces reduced fat cream of chicken soup
10 3/4 ounces reduced fat cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Poach the chicken in one cup of water for 10 minutes. Remove and let cool; reserve broth.
2. When cooled, shred the chicken into pieces.
3. Dip half the tortillas in chicken broth to soften and place them in a 9x13 inch baking dish to cover the bottom.
4. Pour 1/4 cup of broth over the tortillas.
5. Layer with half of the shredded chicken, diced onion, and diced bell pepper.
6. Sprinkle half the cheese over the top.
7. Repeat steps 3-6 to make a second layer with remaining ingredients.
8. Sprinkle garlic powder and chili powder on the top.
9. Preheat oven to 350°F.
10. In a medium bowl, combine the two soups and pour over the casserole.
11. Top with Ro-Tel tomatoes and remaining cheese.
12. Bake for about 45 minutes. Makes 8 servings.
